name: Hot Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken wings in two at the joints.
2. Heat oil to 360°F in a large frying pan or skillet.
3. Add the chicken wings and fry until crisp, about 12-15 minutes.
4. To bake: Preheat oven to 450°F. Place wings on a baking sheet in one layer and bake for 45 minutes.
5. To make sauce: Combine hot sauce or Tabasco with melted butter and mix well.
6. Serve the chicken wings immediately by dousing them with the sauce.
Serves 2-6
Nathalie Dupree's "New Southern Cooking"
